Tests for Math.atan function with various inputs including NaN, undefined, objects, zero, and infinity.


## Files
- **[15.08.02.04-001.js](15.08.02.04-001.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of Math.atan when given NaN as input.
- **[15.08.02.04-002.js](15.08.02.04-002.js.md)**: Tests that `Math.atan(undefined)` returns `NaN`.
- **[15.08.02.04-003.js](15.08.02.04-003.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of Math.atan with an object input to ensure it returns NaN.
- **[15.08.02.04-004.js](15.08.02.04-004.js.md)**: Tests the Math.atan function to verify it returns +0 for an input of +0.
- **[15.08.02.04-005.js](15.08.02.04-005.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the Math.atan function with an input of negative zero.
- **[15.08.02.04-006.js](15.08.02.04-006.js.md)**: Tests the Math.atan function with Infinity as input to verify it returns Math.PI / 2.
- **[15.08.02.04-007.js](15.08.02.04-007.js.md)**: Tests the Math.atan function with Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY to verify it returns Math.PI / 2.
- **[15.08.02.04-008.js](15.08.02.04-008.js.md)**: Tests the Math.atan function with Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY to verify it returns -Math.PI / 2.
- **[15.08.02.04-009.js](15.08.02.04-009.js.md)**: Tests the Math.atan function with a negative input to verify it returns -π/4.
